title: Event Snapshot Spec v1
acceptance_criteria: Header+record schema, versioning, CRC rules, FULL_STATE/DELTA semantics approved and published

title: IPC Wire Spec v1
acceptance_criteria: Frame header, command enums, ACK/ERROR payloads, limits, and compatibility policy approved

title: Render Invalidation Contract
acceptance_criteria: Thread ownership and dirty-rect invalidation API frozen; no ambiguous ownership remains

title: DefView Attachment Controller
acceptance_criteria: Host window attaches relative to SHELLDLL_DefView parent on 25H2 without WorkerW dependency

title: Icon Visibility Ownership Manager
acceptance_criteria: Hide/restore uses ownership token and does not clobber user-prehidden icon state

title: Shell Event Router
acceptance_criteria: TaskbarCreated/session/power/display events rebind host idempotently with no leaks

title: Adapter Device Manager
acceptance_criteria: Per-adapter D3D11 device creation by LUID works with debug/runtime modes

title: Per Monitor Swapchain Manager
acceptance_criteria: Flip-model swapchain lifecycle per monitor supports resize and recreate safely

title: Dirty Present Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Composition texture + Present1 dirty rect path renders only invalid regions

title: Dirty Rect Coalescer
acceptance_criteria: Rect merge/cap thresholds reduce overhead and preserve correctness

title: Device Lost Recovery FSM
acceptance_criteria: Device removed/reset recovery rebuilds resources and returns to rendering without restart

title: Geo Math Core WGS84 ECEF
acceptance_criteria: Geodetic/ECEF conversions and ray-ellipsoid intersections are unit-tested and numerically stable

title: Camera Modes and State
acceptance_criteria: Free-fly/orbit camera state machine works with double precision authoritative state

title: Cursor Anchored Dolly Zoom
acceptance_criteria: Zoom moves toward cursor hit anchor and keeps anchor screen error within tolerance

title: IOCP Snapshot Directory Watcher
acceptance_criteria: ReadDirectoryChangesW with IOCP coalesces to latest generation and avoids polling

title: Snapshot Validator Parser
acceptance_criteria: Parser enforces bounds/version/CRC and rejects malformed snapshots safely

title: Event Store and TTL Heap
acceptance_criteria: Upsert/clear/expiry semantics are deterministic with bounded memory

title: Dirty Region Generation
acceptance_criteria: Adds/removes/modifies generate minimal padded dirty regions and request redraw correctly

title: Overlay Throttle Gate <=10Hz
acceptance_criteria: Input bursts above 10Hz coalesce while preserving final state and bounded latency

title: Named Pipe Server Overlapped
acceptance_criteria: Binary framed named pipe server handles connect/read/write with bounded payloads

title: IPC Security Enforcement
acceptance_criteria: Same-user SID and session checks enforced; remote clients rejected

title: Interactive Input Router
acceptance_criteria: Mouse and keyboard controls work in active mode with clean capture/focus transitions

title: IPC and User Arbitration Engine
acceptance_criteria: Channel leases prevent jitter between user and IPC; deferred commands coalesce deterministically

title: Monitor Topology Tracker
acceptance_criteria: Monitor add/remove/rotate/DPI changes trigger deterministic context rebuild

title: Scale Preserving Projection Policy
acceptance_criteria: Highest-resolution monitor anchors density while preserving world scale across outputs

title: Startup and Restart Manager
acceptance_criteria: Per-user startup and restart policy relaunches reliably without duplicate instances

title: State Persistence Restore
acceptance_criteria: Camera/style/layout restore uses atomic writes with rollback on corruption

title: Session Transition Manager
acceptance_criteria: Lock/unlock/logoff/logon and suspend/resume paths pause/resume safely

title: ETW Instrumentation and Counters
acceptance_criteria: ETW events expose render requests, present counts, dirty coverage, and recovery timing

title: WPR Automation Harness
acceptance_criteria: Automated baseline/idle/active captures produce comparable reports and thresholds

title: Snapshot Parser Fuzz Harness
acceptance_criteria: Malformed snapshot corpus cannot crash process or violate bounds

title: IPC Fuzz and Spam Harness
acceptance_criteria: Malformed packets and high-rate spam remain bounded with correct disconnect behavior

title: Long Soak and Chaos Suite
acceptance_criteria: 24h/72h soak with explorer restart/device reset/session churn has zero unplanned exits

title: Release Exit Gate
acceptance_criteria: All must-pass gates green including near-zero idle target and stability thresholds
